---
title: "Charles Ray"
---

## Charles Ray

**Dates:** (Otterbourne 1855-?1927)

### Description

gardener, parish clerk

### Biography

He married (?1881) Ann ?Marsh.

### Letters

- [To Catharine Elgie, March 15 [1898]](../letters/3373_To_Catharine_Elgie.html)
- Letter from Jan 29th [1896]
- Letter from Jan 23d 1896
- Letter from April 27 [1892[[footnote:1]]].
- Letter from [April 1892[[footnote:1]]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
